description: A load has been delivered. An agent must create and send an invoice to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Identify a load that has a status of 'Delivered' and has a signed Proof of Delivery (POD).

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a load that is ready to be billed.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the linehaul rate from the rate confirmation and calculate any applicable fuel surcharge.

expected_outcome.value: The total charges are correctly calculated.

nodes.task_description: Generate the invoice document, attaching a copy of the signed POD.

expected_outcome.value: A complete and accurate invoice is created.

nodes.task_description: Send the invoice to the customer's accounts payable contact.

expected_outcome.value: The invoice is successfully emailed to the customer.
